name: Verify Friend Request Persistence After User Logout and Login
description: Test case that verifies a sent friend request remains active after the user logs out and logs back in.
descriptionHtml: Test case that verifies a sent friend request remains active after the user logs out and logs back in.

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Sign in
Send 'POST' request to '/signIn'
Precondition: A target user exists in the system who is not yet in the user's friend list
Delete user's request to friend
Send 'DELETE' request to '/31/cancelRequest'

testStage.description: Test case that verifies a sent friend request remains active after the user logs out and logs back in.

steps.name: Step 1: Navigate to the Greencity URL.
Step 2: Click on the 'My Space' section in the header.
Clicking the my space link in the header
Step 3: Click on the 'See all' link in the 'My friends' section within the profile information block.
Click View all friends link
Check My Friends page is loaded
Step 4: Click on 'Find a friend' tab on 'My Friends' page.
Select tab: 'Find a friend'
Step 5: Enter the target user name into the Search input field.
Get a friend name and city from a Friend card
Step 6: Click the 'Add Friend' button on the found user's card.
Click Add friend button on a Friend card
Step 7: Click on the User Profile icon (dropdown) in the header.
Clicking the user menu in the header.
Step 8: Click the 'Sign out' button.
Clicking the sign out link in user menu in the header.
Step 9:Click the 'Sign in' button in the header.
Clicking signin button in the header
Checking if the sign-in modal is displayed
Step 10:Enter the valid email address and password into the Sign In fields, and click the 'Sign in' button.
Sign in
Step 11:Click on the 'See all' link in the 'My friends' section within the profile information block.
Click View all friends link
Check My Friends page is loaded
Step 12: Click on 'Find a friend' tab on 'My Friends' page.
Select tab: 'Find a friend'
Step 13: Enter the same target user name into the Search input field.
Get a friend name and city from a Friend card
